---
name: Locale request
about: Add a new language locale to the skill.
title: "[LOCALE] Add <Language> grimdark register"
labels: locale, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Target language

E.g. Spanish (Castilian + Latin American), Arabic (Fusha), Mandarin, Portuguese (Brazilian + European), Turkish, Persian.

## Register goal

Grimdark literary equivalent of the language's historical / archaic register. NOT modern colloquial, NOT academic.

## USE vocabulary (proposed)

List 15–25 words you'd put in the USE column. Provide gloss in English.

```
- <word> (<translation> — register note)
- <word> (<translation> — register note)
- ...
```

## AVOID vocabulary

List 5–10 words/idioms that break register.

## Reference voice (ElevenLabs or other TTS)

Voice name + register note (e.g. "deep baritone, slow, somber").

## Example coverage

If you're available to translate one full Phase-1 output as proof of register, mention here.
